scripts.build: lerna run build --stream && npm --prefix project/api run build && npm --prefix project/web run build
scripts.lint: lerna run lint --stream && npm --prefix project/api run lint
scripts.lint:fix: lerna run lint:fix --stream && npm --prefix project/api run lint:fix
scripts.format: lerna run format --stream && npm --prefix project/api run format
scripts.format:fix: lerna run format:fix --stream && npm --prefix project/api run format:fix
scripts.code: lerna run lint --stream && lerna run format --stream
scripts.web:build: lerna run build --stream && npm --prefix project/web install && rm -rf project/web/.angular && npm --prefix project/web run build
scripts.api:build: lerna run build --stream && npm --prefix project/api run build && rm project/api/dist/mongo-server.*
scripts.api:install: lerna run build --stream && npm --prefix project/api install
scripts.presdk: npm run api:build && node project/api/dist/open-api.js && rm project/api/dist/open-api.* && rm -rf project/api-sdk
scripts.sdk2: rm -rf project/api-sdk && openapi-generator-cli generate && npm run sdk:build
scripts.clean: rm -rf node_modules && npx lerna clean -y && rm -rf project/api/node_modules && rm -rf project/web/node_modules
